{{Quote|And tonight we have a special match-up, just for you, my special friends. Right here – tonight – we have a battle royale. My friends, Cromag!|[[Mosh Pelkan]] announcing Cromag into his gladiator pit|<ref name="The Game Chambers of Questal">''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]''</ref>}}
'''Cromag''' was a large [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] beast "owned" by [[Mosh Pelkan]]. He was two and a half meters tall, with huge eyes with overdeveloped shoulders and arms. He was described as having a shape like a "V".

He was the primary combatant in the gladiatorial arena at [[Pelkan's Mansion]] on [[Questal/Legends|Questal]]. Many of his opponents were prisoners of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Bandor (Moff)|Bandor]] whom Pelkin served. On one occasion he fought and killed a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] simultaneously in the arena.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]'' {{Reprint|The Game Chambers of Questal}} {{1st}}
